name: Glitch Metropolis
summary: Glitch Metropolis is a fast, physical VR combat game set in a dystopian concrete city. Dodge bullets and lasers, punch flying iron mask-enemies, and control time with your movement. Your hands heat up as you fight — build pressure, then unleash a brutal combo. Weapons glitch into your hands mid-encounter: katanas, revolvers, and whatever you can throw. Every arena is built for intense, readable action and immediate flow.
